description: A flaw has been found in Tenda CH22 1.0.0.1. Affected by this issue is the function fromNatStaticSetting of the file /goform/NatStaticSetting. Executing a manipulation of the argument page can lead to buffer overflow. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.
